name: flutter-probe
description: End-to-end testing for Flutter apps. Manage devices, author and run ProbeScript tests, capture screenshots, generate reports — directly from Claude Desktop.
long_description:
FlutterProbe is a high-performance E2E testing framework for Flutter mobile apps. This extension exposes 18 tools to Claude:

- **Device lifecycle** — list, start, and shut down iOS simulators and Android emulators.
- **Test authoring** — read and write `.probe` files, dump the live widget tree, take screenshots.
- **Execution** — run tests on a single device, in parallel, or as multi-device composite tests.
- **Reporting** — read JSON results, generate HTML reports.
- **Project management** — initialize a new project, record interactions, AI-generate tests from a prompt.

After install, Claude can read your widget tree and write tests that target real selectors — no manual JSON config or PATH setup required.

projectRoot.title: Flutter project directory
projectRoot.description: Path to the Flutter app you want to test. Should contain probe.yaml and a tests/ folder. Tools like run_tests and get_report resolve paths against this directory.

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List connected/booted simulators, emulators, and physical devices.

tools.name: start_device
tools.description: Boot an Android emulator or iOS simulator.

tools.name: shutdown_device
tools.description: Shut down an iOS simulator or Android emulator.

tools.name: get_widget_tree
tools.description: Dump the live Flutter widget tree from the running app.

tools.name: take_screenshot
tools.description: Capture the current screen and return it as an image.

tools.name: read_test
tools.description: Read the contents of a .probe test file.

tools.name: write_test
tools.description: Create or overwrite a .probe file. Validates ProbeScript syntax before writing.

tools.name: run_script
tools.description: Execute inline ProbeScript without creating a file.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run .probe test files. Supports composite multi-device tests.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List all .probe files in a directory.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Read the most recently modified JSON test run report.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate a standalone HTML report from a JSON results file.

tools.name: generate_test
tools.description: AI-generate a .probe test from a natural language prompt.

tools.name: init_project
tools.description: Scaffold a new probe.yaml and tests/ directory.

tools.name: record
tools.description: Record user interactions and generate a .probe file.
